ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality test */,
  "quality_parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being tested (e.g., Drop point, Water absorption ability) */,
  "research_conducted" TEXT /* Research experiments associated with the test */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements to be met for the quality parameter */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_conducted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who conducted the test */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol used for the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_tests_test_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("test_conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality test corresponding to the result */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result obtained from the quality test */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of whether the result meets the requirements */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the actual result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the quality control analyst who approved the result */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES quality_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, quality control analyst, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of an experiment protocol */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the protocol */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
